title: cytisus capitatus subsp. bisflorens
intro: Cytisus capitatus subsp. bisflorens, also known as the Retama monspeliaca, is a plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cytisus capitatus subsp. bisflorens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support cardiovascular health. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
